title: Manhunter
description: MCreator Mod that lets you become a BOUNTY HUNTER.
body:
By killing either Illagers or Villagers, you can use their brand new drops to craft new profession blocks, allowing you to trade these new drops with Villagers in for Emeralds.

Work up the ranks of a Manhunter out for Illager Cloth, or a Traitor out for Villager Souls, gathering more and more rewards the longer you work for them, truly living out your manhunting fantasy!

If I do decide to continue this project, I'd like to add:
- Advancements
- An item or effect that makes Illagers peaceful towards the player
- Unique bounties on unique enemies, mini-bosses, and bosses
